THE MOTION WAS FILED AND SERVED BY MAIL ON JANUARY 21, 2014. MOVING PARTY ONLY PROVIDED 15 DAYS COURT DAYS NOTICE AND FAILED TO ACCOUNT FOR THE 5 CALENDAR DAY EXTENSION FOR MAIL SERVICE. Notice Of Motion For Order Of Dismissal
Off Calendar Feb-11-2014 Off Calendar
MINI MINUTES:

No appearance on this matter. The Court adopted its tentative ruling.
DEFENDANT RAYMOND JETER's Motion For Order Of Dismissal is Off calendar as untimely under CCP 1005(b). The motion was filed and served by mail on January 21, 2014. Moving party only provided 15 days court days notice and failed to account for the 5 calendar day extension for mail service. Judge: Ernest H. Goldsmith, Clerk: Cynthia Herbert, Not reported. =(302/EHG)
